# Multi-Image to Image

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/multiImageToImage`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/multiImageToImage/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-EXLUKyk7.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-multi-image-to-image`
- `query-multi-image-to-image-single`
- `query-multi-image-to-image-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/images/multi-image2image`
- `/v1/images/multi-image2image/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Multi-Image to Image",zh:"多图参考生图"},endpoints:[{id:"create-multi-image-to-image",method:"POST",path:"/v1/images/multi-image2image",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},description:{en:"Generate images based on multiple reference images (subject, scene, style).",zh:"基于多张参考图片（主体、场景、风格）生成图像。"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"model_name",type:"string",required:!1,default:"kling-v2",description:{en:"Model Name",zh:"模型名称"},enum:["kling-v2","kling-v2-1"]},{name:"prompt",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Positive text prompt",zh:"正向文本提示词"},notes:[{en:"- Cannot exceed 2500 characters",zh:"- 不能超过 2500 个字符"}]},{name:"subject_image_list",type:"array",required:!0,description:{en:"Subject Reference Images",zh:"主体参考图片列表"},notes:[{en:'- Support up to 4 images, at least 1 image, using key:value format as follows:\n```json\n"subject_image_list":[\n  { "subject_image":"image_url" },\n  { "subject_image":"image_url" },\n  { "subject_image":"image_url" },\n  { "subject_image":"image_url" }\n]\n```',zh:'- 最多支持 4 张图片，最少支持 1 张图片，用 key:value 承载，如下：\n```json\n"subject_image_list":[\n  { "subject_image":"image_url" },\n  { "subject_image":"image_url" },\n  { "subject_image":"image_url" },\n  { "subject_image":"image_url" }\n]\n```'},{en:"- The API does not perform cropping, please upload images with subjects already cropped",zh:"- API 端无裁剪逻辑，请直接上传已选主体后的图片"},{en:"- Supports image input as either Base64-encoded string or URL (ensure the URL is publicly accessible)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Important: When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Submit only the raw Base64 string.",zh:"- 注意：若您使用 Base64 方式，请不要在 Base64 编码字符串前添加任何前缀（如 `data:image/png;base64,`），直接传递 Base64 编码后的字符串即可。"},{en:"- **Correct Base64 format:**\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- **正确的 Base64 编码参数：**\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Incorrect Base64 format (with data: prefix):\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 错误的 Base64 编码参数（包含 data: 前缀）：\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- Image file size must not exceed 10MB. Image dimensions must be at least 300px in width and height. Aspect ratio must be between 1:2.5 and 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比要在 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"}],children:[{name:"subject_image",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Subject image URL or Base64 string",zh:"主体图片 URL 或 Base64 字符串"}}]},{name:"scene_image",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Scene Reference Image",zh:"场景参考图"},notes:[{en:"- Supports image input as either Base64-encoded string or URL (ensure the URL is publicly accessible)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Important: When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Image dimensions must be at least 300px in width and height. Aspect ratio must be between 1:2.5 and 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比要在 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"}]},{name:"style_image",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Style Reference Image",zh:"风格参考图"},notes:[{en:"- Supports image input as either Base64-encoded string or URL (ensure the URL is publicly accessible)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Important: When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Aspect ratio must be between 1:2.5 and 2.5:1",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px，图片宽高比要在 1:2.5 ~ 2.5:1 之间"}]},{name:"n",type:"int",required:!1,default:"1",description:{en:"Number of generated images",zh:"生成图片数量"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [1, 9]",zh:"- 取值范围：[1, 9]"}]},{name:"aspect_ratio",type:"string",required:!1,default:"16:9",description:{en:"Aspect ratio of the generated images (width:height)",zh:"生成图片的画面纵横比（宽:高）"},enum:["16:9","9:16","1:1","4:3","3:4","3:2","2:3","21:9"]},{name:"watermark_info",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously",zh:"是否同时生成含水印的结果"},notes:[{en:'- Defined by the enabled parameter, format: \n```json\n  "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```',zh:'- 通过enabled参数定义，具体格式如下：\n```json\n "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```'},{en:"- true: generate watermarked result, false: do not generate",zh:"- true 为生成，false 为不生成"},{en:"- Custom watermarks are not currently supported",zh:"- 暂不支持自定义水印"}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The callback notification address for the result of this task.
```
